name: adoptme-discord-bot
description: Discord bot for Adopt Me embeds, trade requests, and house media posts.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/deploy-commands.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/utils/embeds.js && node --check src/commands/index.js && node --check src/commands/embed.js && node --check src/commands/house.js && node --check src/commands/ping.js && node --check src/commands/trade.js
